See the * [FAQ in the README](README.md#problems-with-invalid-numbers] on how to make * metadata changes. * * Do not modify this file directly! */ return [ 96350 => 'Rcell', 96391 => 'Wafa Telecom', 96392 => 'Wafa Telecom', 96393 => 'Syriatel', 96394 => 'MTN', 963950 => 'MTN', 963952 => 'MTN', 963954 => 'MTN', 963955 => 'MTN', 963956 => 'MTN', 963957 => 'MTN', 963958 => 'MTN', 963959 => 'MTN', 96396 => 'MTN', 96398 => 'Syriatel', 96399 => 'Syriatel', ];
